items.name: yudao-ai-ms
items.description: `yudao-ai-ms` 是一个基于 Spring Boot 3 的多模块单体后端，配套管理端前端为 `yudao-ai-ms-ui-admin-vue3`。当前服务只装配系统管理与基础设施两个业务模块，适合作为 企业后台、SaaS 管理端和内部工具的基础工程。

items.name: gitdeck
items.description: Gitdeck is a terminal UI for managing multiple Git repositories under one folder. It scans a workspace, shows each repo’s status, and lets you pull, push, commit, inspect changes, check remotes, and edit .gitignore files from one keyboard-driven interface.

items.name: jlens-gguf
items.description: Interactive Jacobian-Lens visualizer and live steerer for GGUF models on llama.cpp

items.name: ausTvSales
items.description: AusTV Sales Dashboard — event-driven sales tracking system for AusTV's in-game cash economy. Replaces MyCommand's cumulative counters with timestamped sale events (Java plugin → SQLite fallback queue → NestJS/PostgreSQL API), enabling real time-series analysis and per-item top-buyer rankings across categories (crates, passes, pets, fly time).

items.name: hevy-ranks
items.description: Turn your Hevy workouts into a strength rank per muscle group. Get one of nine tiers (Bronze → Mythic) from your best estimated 1RM relative to bodyweight. Connect via the Hevy API key or a CSV export — everything runs client-side in your browser. Open-source, non-profit, not affiliated with Hevy.
